channel.title: Artin Kavoosi — Research Notes
channel.description: Short notes on research, methods, and things I'm working through.

item.title: Stochastic Queens Elimination
item.description: A stochastic, elimination-based variant of the n-queens problem: an MDP formulation, a provably suboptimal greedy baseline, a closed-form heuristic (ACG) with a worst-case approximation guarantee, and an exact MIP for the deterministic case.

item.title: An interactive S-SQEP policy simulator
item.description: Step through Random-admissible, Greedy-degree, and Adaptive Coverage Greedy yourself on the same n=8 board as the main post, and watch the cumulative conflict cost race against the exact optimal value.

item.title: On average reward criterion
item.description: At first view, the average-reward Markov Decision Process (MDP) feels like the natural choice, especially next to discounted formulations that often need extra real-world justification.

item.title: An introduction to MDP
item.description: In February 2025, I presented at the University of Tehran about MDP, the literature on MDP (mostly before RL!), the Bellman optimality equation, and classical MDP examples.
